ARGUED, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION: SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS SUPPORTING A NEGLIGENCE CLAIM AS TO AXIS. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION: SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO AXIS. AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO HOLMES TO PLEAD RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT THAT IS COVERED BY SECTION 51.9. 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION: OVERRULED. NOTICE WAIVED.
